description: Scoped to (1) the hand-vendored asset .VERSION files and (2) the mise.toml [tools] pins — both custom.regex with `# renovate:` annotations; Dependabot still owns Python/uv, GitHub Actions and Docker (.github/dependabot.yml), so the two never touch the same files. Only .VERSION bumps run the allow-listed dev/update_vendored_assets.py postUpgradeTask (packageRule-scoped); mise bumps are plain version edits.

customManagers.description: mise.toml [tools] exact pins (uv, prek, helm, kubeconform, git-cliff, trivy). Regex, not the native mise manager: Renovate v46 has no short-name mapping for prek/kubeconform/git-cliff and would silently skip them.

packageRules.description: Vendored JSON schemas are payload-validated by the publication test suite + the OSV ecosystem drift guard, so a breaking change fails CI — safe to auto-merge on green.
Frontend assets (htmx, ALTCHA widget, Inter, neoteroi CSS) have no behavioral tests — PR for manual smoke, never auto-merge.
Re-vendor ONLY on .VERSION bumps — mise toolchain bumps must not re-download vendored assets. (matchManagers can't discriminate here: both managers are custom.regex.)
mise toolchain: one grouped weekly PR, never auto-merge — helm/kubeconform are CI-exercised, but git-cliff/trivy only run at release time, so green CI can't vouch for them.
